# Pxlkit Commercial Licensing

This file is kept for backward compatibility.

Use the new licensing documents instead:

- [LICENSE](./LICENSE) — licensing overview
- [LICENSE-CODE](./LICENSE-CODE) — MIT license for code
- [LICENSE-ASSETS](./LICENSE-ASSETS) — source-available terms for icon packs and visual assets
- [COMMERCIAL_TERMS](./COMMERCIAL_TERMS) — paid no-attribution asset terms
- [TRADEMARK_POLICY](./TRADEMARK_POLICY) — brand and naming rules
- [THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES](./THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES) — third-party software and font notices
